---
title: "Services"
---

::: footer
### TriAnn Integrated Farm

📞 Phone: +4915510230189\
📧 Email: triannfarm\@email.com\
📍 Morogoro, Tanzania

© 2026 TriAnn Integrated Farm
:::

`<a href="https://wa.me/`{=html}4915510230189`?text=Hello%20I%20want%20to%20order%20from%20TriAnn%20Farm" class="whatsapp">`{=html} Order via WhatsApp </a>
